title: GraphicsMagick module not found in n8n worker
symptom: The n8n worker fails to start with an error indicating that the 'graphicsmagick' module cannot be found. This prevents the worker from executing any tasks.
applies_when: Running the n8n worker in a Docker container
not_this_if: GraphicsMagick is installed correctly and the worker starts without errors
root_cause: The error occurs because the n8n task runner requires the GraphicsMagick module to be available in the Node.js environment. If it is only installed as a system binary and not as a Node.js module, the task runner will not be able to find it, leading to the MODULE_NOT_FOUND error.
fix_steps: Modify the Dockerfile to include the installation of the GraphicsMagick npm module by adding 'npm install -g gm' in the appropriate section.
Ensure that the Docker image is rebuilt and the n8n worker is restarted after making these changes.
agent_instruction: Install the GraphicsMagick npm module in your Dockerfile and rebuild the image.
